query:
SELECT 
  m.id,
  m.clientId,
  c.name as clientName,
  m.mealType,
  m.createdAt,
  m.aiDescription,
  mc.name as componentName,
  mc.calories,
  mc.protein,
  mc.carbs,
  mc.fat
FROM meals m
LEFT JOIN clients c ON m.clientId = c.id
LEFT JOIN meal_components mc ON m.id = mc.mealId
WHERE m.source = 'nutrition_label'
  AND (mc.calories > 1000 OR mc.protein > 100 OR mc.carbs > 200)
ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 50;
